evaluation_frame.project_intent: Create, share, and export snippets in the bounded evaluation application.
non_goals: Production topology and external storage migration

driver_screen.basis: No separate architecture package is requested for this fixture.
All capabilities remain in one evaluation runtime.
Create, share, and export all consume the same snippet state.
The controlled fixture records no new trust or residency boundary.
The existing evaluation topology is retained.
No quality target forces another topology.
The feature plan records a shared foundation owner.
The fixture is not a reuse baseline.
Required ownership evidence already determines applicability.

capabilities.outcome: Users create, share, and export snippets.
capabilities.observable: Created snippets can be shared and exported.

journeys.outcome: A stored snippet is consumed through independent workflows.
journeys.observable: Each workflow uses the stored snippet.

criteria.basis: Preserve create, share, and export outcomes when evaluating any future direction.
Retain the fixture's recorded workflow behavior and failure constraints.
Prefer compatibility with the existing bounded evaluation application.
Keep the shared snippet foundation independently extensible.
Avoid adding operational surface without evidence.
Keep delivery risk proportionate to the controlled fixture.

recommendation.basis: The fixture records an explicit human waiver instead of selecting a direction.

selection.rationale: The human accepted architecture rework risk for this controlled legacy fixture.
